sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17492" key="au)cike/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐξι-κέρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ω,</itype> <sense id="n17492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with rising horns,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> (Dind.).</sense> </entryFree>
